Video.summary: Check out all the freestyle Monster Jam action from MetLife Stadium on June 13, 2015 with 20 Trucks!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Image.alt: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Video.summary: It's time for freestyle! This time, Monster Jam takes on Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, FL during the 2001 season.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Watch as Monster Jam goes racing at Reliant Stadium in Houston, TX for the second time this year, on February 2, 2008.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2021 season continues from NRG Stadium on February 7, 2021 with all the freestyle and racing action!
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Don't miss all the thrilling Monster Jam racing and freestyle action from the Alamodome on January 15, 2011.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Red takes over the Dome at America’s Center. Can Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson hang on to the series points lead? Will Tom Meents celebrate 20 years of Maximum Destruction with a win close to home? Find out when Monster Jam heads to St. Louis, Missouri for Round 3.
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Grave Digger has taken the series title! How will the finale turn out? Tune in to find out!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Goldberg and freestyle go hand-in-hand, but will he find success during the last freestyle of the season? It's Monster Jam freestyle from the Silverdome in Pontiac, Mi!
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into M&T Bank Stadium, on June 2, 2012 with all your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Image.alt: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Video.summary: On February 22, 2020 at Marlin's Park, see all the racing and freestyle action from Monster Jam's 2020 season!
Video.title: Marlins Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2010 season races into Ford Field, on January 16, 2010.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: New England fans watch as 14 of the best Jammer's go head to head in freestyle.
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster trucks buck like wild horses in Broncos Stadium.
Video.title: Broncos Stadium - Denver, CO

Video.summary: They may have lost the Ram's, but gained Monster Jam, check out all the action from the Edward Jones Dome in St. Louis.
Video.title: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO
Edward Jones Dome - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Ten of the top Monster Jam truck drivers take on mother nature during the freestyle round at Alltel Stadium in Jacksonville, Florida!
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: The RCA Dome in Indianapolis comes alive as Monster Jam freestyle takes center stage.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes to Texas on the next stop of the 2011 tour with racing action from Cowboys Stadium, on February 26, 2011.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Sun Bowl Stadium in El Paso, TX is ground zero for Monster Jam action.
Video.title: Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Image.alt: Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Video.summary: Watch as Monster Jam rocks into the UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium on March 7, 2009.
Video.title: Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle

Image.alt: Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle
Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle
Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 1 of the Stadium Championship Series at Ring Central Coliseum in Oakland, CA.
Video.title: Ring Central Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series East drives into the Rodeo Capital. Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga holds the series points lead and looks for his third consecutive event win as Tom Meents returns to the stadium where he debuted Maximum Destruction 20 years ago.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Don't miss Monster Jam freestyle action at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam in East Rutherford with racing, skills, and freestyle that the whole family will enjoy!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: Inglewood, CA is the next stop for Monster Jam Primetime with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action!
Video.title: Sofi Stadium - Inglewood, CA

Video.summary: Primetime visits San Antonio, TX for Round 7 of Stadium Championship East.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: World Finals IV continue with freestyle excitement from your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: World Finals IV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals IV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals IV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals IV - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Video.summary: We’ve gathered the most jaw-dropping highlights featuring the Marvel-themed monster trucks. Featuring The Amazing Spider-Man, Thor, Iron Man, and Black Panther. AND - Genius, billionaire, playboy, monster truck. Suit up for this action packed compilation of Marvel's Iron Man as we highlight the best freestyles of driver Brandon Arthur and this hero on four wheels!
Video.title: Best of Marvel Monster Trucks

Video.summary: Experience the 2025 Monster Jam in Arlington, Texas — where top drivers and roaring fans come together for the ultimate dirt-fueled championship battle.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington,TX
